creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text: Note that if you apply the patch it is necessary to recompile all kernel modules _including_external_ones_ (those in /boot/modules, e.g. GPU drivers)... since an internal kernel structure changed; IIRC it is struct pcpu in sys/sys/pcpu.h?  Likewise, do not forget to update /usr/include/sys.
